title: Savory Spinach Portuguese Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix dish featuring salty and dense flavors with horseradish to add a kick of spice, dairy-free for those who prefer it that way.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons olive oil or vegan alternative
1 tablespoon ground pepper (optional, for extra spiciness)

instructions: Heat the oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add onion and garlic; sauté until fragrant and lightly browned.
Stir in spinach, salt to taste, and if using pepper, add now as well.
Pour lemon or lime juice over vegetables. Deglaze the pan by scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
If desired, add grated horseradish for extra spiciness.
Mix in some nutritional yeast or soy sauce to enhance flavor (optional).
Stir occasionally until spinach is cooked through and mixture thickens slightly. Serve hot.
